            have h₉ := hf x₀ x₀ 1 (x₀ ^ 2) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by norm_num) (by positivity) (by
              nlinarith)
            have h₁₀ := hf 1 x₀ x₀ 1 (by norm_num) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by norm_num) (by
              nlinarith)
            have h₁₁ := hf x₀ 1 1 x₀ (by linarith) (by norm_num) (by norm_num) (by linarith) (by
              nlinarith)
            have h₁₂ := hf x x 1 (x ^ 2) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by norm_num) (by positivity) (by
              nlinarith)
            have h₁₃ := hf 1 x x 1 (by norm_num) (by linarith) (by linarith) (by norm_num) (by
              nlinarith)
            have h₁₄ := hf x 1 1 x (by linarith) (by norm_num) (by norm_num) (by linarith) (by
              nlinarith)
            -- Simplify the equations to find a relationship between f(x) and x
            field_simp [h₁, hx, h₆, pow_pos, hx₀_pos, pow_pos] at h₈ h₉ h₁₀ h₁₁ h₁₂ h₁₃ h₁₄ ⊢
            <;>
            (try ring_nf at h₈ h₉ h₁₀ h₁₁ h₁₂ h₁₃ h₁₄ ⊢) <;>
            (try nlinarith [h₁ x₀ hx₀_pos, h₁ 1 (by norm_num), h₁ x hx]) <;>
            (try
              {
                nlinarith [h₁ x₀ hx₀_pos, h₁ 1 (by norm_num), h₁ x hx,
                  sq_pos_of_pos (h₁ x₀ hx₀_pos), sq_pos_of_pos (h₁ 1 (by norm_num)),
                  sq_pos_of_pos (h₁ x hx)]
              }) <;>
            (try
              {
                field_simp [h₁ x₀ hx₀_pos, h₁ 1 (by norm_num), h₁ x hx] at h₉ h₁₀ h₁₁ h₁₂ h₁₃ h₁₄ ⊢ <;>
                nlinarith [h₁ x₀ hx₀_pos, h₁ 1 (by norm_num), h₁ x hx]
              }) <;>
            (try
              {
                apply mul_left_cancel₀ (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₅)
                nlinarith [h₁ x₀ hx₀_pos, h₁ 1 (by norm_num), h₁ x hx]
              })
            <;>
            (try
              {
                nlinarith [h₁ x₀ hx₀_pos, h₁ 1 (by norm_num), h₁ x hx]
              })
          exact h₇
        exact Or.inr h₃
    exact h₂
  have h_converse : ((∀ x > 0, f x = x) ∨ (∀ x > 0, f x = 1 / x)) → (∀ w x y z : ℝ, 0 < w → 0 < x → 0 < y → 0 < z → w * x = y * z → (f w ^ 2 + f x ^ 2) / (f (y ^ 2) + f (z ^ 2)) = (w ^ 2 + x ^ 2) / (y ^ 2 + z ^ 2)) := by
    intro h
    cases h with
    | inl h =>
      intro w x y z hw hx hy hz hwx
      have h₁ : f w = w := h w hw
      have h₂ : f x = x := h x hx
      have h₃ : ∀ (a : ℝ), a > 0 → f a = a := h
      have h₄ : f (y ^ 2) = y ^ 2 := by
        have h₅ : y ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
        have h₆ : f (y ^ 2) = y ^ 2 := h (y ^ 2) (by positivity)
        exact h₆
      have h₅ : f (z ^ 2) = z ^ 2 := by
        have h₆ : z ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
        have h₇ : f (z ^ 2) = z ^ 2 := h (z ^ 2) (by positivity)
        exact h₇
      rw [h₁, h₂, h₄, h₅]
      <;> field_simp [add_assoc]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> field_simp [add_assoc]
      <;> nlinarith [sq_nonneg (w - x), sq_nonneg (y - z)]
    | inr h =>
      intro w x y z hw hx hy hz hwx
      have h₁ : f w = 1 / w := h w hw
      have h₂ : f x = 1 / x := h x hx
      have h₃ : ∀ (a : ℝ), a > 0 → f a = 1 / a := h
      have h₄ : f (y ^ 2) = 1 / (y ^ 2) := by
        have h₅ : y ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
        have h₆ : f (y ^ 2) = 1 / (y ^ 2) := h (y ^ 2) (by positivity)
        exact h₆
      have h₅ : f (z ^ 2) = 1 / (z ^ 2) := by
        have h₆ : z ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
        have h₇ : f (z ^ 2) = 1 / (z ^ 2) := h (z ^ 2) (by positivity)
        exact h₇
      rw [h₁, h₂, h₄, h₅]
      have h₆ : 0 < w * x := by positivity
      have h₇ : 0 < y * z := by positivity
      have h₈ : 0 < y ^ 2 := by positivity
      have h₉ : 0 < z ^ 2 := by positivity
      have h₁₀ : 0 < y ^ 2 * z ^ 2 := by positivity
      field_simp [h₆.ne', h₇.ne', h₈.ne', h₉.ne', h₁₀.ne']
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> field_simp [hwx]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> nlinarith [sq_nonneg (w - x), sq_nonneg (y - z)]
  constructor
  · intro h
    exact h_main h
  · intro h
    exact h_converse h

have h_main : (∀ w x y z : ℝ, 0 < w → 0 < x → 0 < y → 0 < z → w * x = y * z → (f w ^ 2 + f x ^ 2) / (f (y ^ 2) + f (z ^ 2)) = (w ^ 2 + x ^ 2) / (y ^ 2 + z ^ 2)) → ((∀ x > 0, f x = x) ∨ ∀ x > 0, f x = 1 / x) := by
    sorry
  have h_converse : ((∀ x > 0, f x = x) ∨ ∀ x > 0, f x = 1 / x) → (∀ w x y z : ℝ, 0 < w → 0 < x → 0 < y → 0 < z → w * x = y * z → (f w ^ 2 + f x ^ 2) / (f (y ^ 2) + f (z ^ 2)) = (w ^ 2 + x ^ 2) / (y ^ 2 + z ^ 2)) := by
    sorry
  exact ⟨h_main, h_converse⟩
